commentaries.author: Hippolytus of Rome
commentaries.content: Thus just as in paradise the devil hid in the snake, also now, hidden in the elders, it has conceived desire in order to corrupt Eve anew. - "Commentary on Daniel 1.18.4"

commentaries.author: Hippolytus of Rome
commentaries.content: Thus here it is symbolized that anyone who wants to partake of the water that flows in the garden must renounce the gate that is wide and enter through the tight and narrow door. - "Commentary on Daniel 1.18.3"

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
